introSection: Kids Coaster (Japanese: キッズコースター) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Izu Granpal Park in Ito, Shizuoka, Japan.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Brown track and white supports. The ride used to feature brown track and dark green supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Kids Coaster (Japanese: キッズコースター) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Izu Granpal Park in Ito, Shizuoka, Japan.



Brown track and white supports. The ride used to feature brown track and dark green supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
